title: Qinhuangdao Hengjie Plastic Co., Ltd. won the "Outstanding Contribution Award" of Huajin Group
contentHtml:
On November 5, the polymer customer symposium of Northern Huajin Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was held in Yuyao, Zhejiang. Qinhuangdao Hengjie Plastic Co., Ltd. was invited to participate in the conference and won the "Outstanding Contribution Award" issued by Huajin Group.

At the meeting, the participating leaders conducted an in-depth discussion on the development situation of the domestic and foreign polymer chemical raw material industry in 2020-2021. Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Qinhuangdao Tianhui Plastic Group, spoke as an important customer.

Since its establishment, Qinhuangdao Hengjie Plastic has always adhered to the concept of quality first and honest management, and has won awards for many years.
titleZh: 秦皇岛市恒捷塑料有限公司荣获华锦集团“突出贡献奖”
contentHtmlZh:
11月5日，北方华锦化学工业股份有限公司聚合物客户座谈会在浙江余姚召开。秦皇岛市恒捷塑料有限公司受邀参会并荣获华锦集团颁发的“突出贡献奖”。

会上，与会领导就2020-2021年度国内外聚合物化工品原料行业发展形势进行深入探讨。秦皇岛市天晖塑料集团董事长曾胜文作为重要客户发言。

秦皇岛市恒捷塑料自创立以来，始终坚持质量第一，诚信经营诚信的理念，已持续多年获得殊荣。
